paragraphs.content: O praise the LORD, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.
paragraphs.contentHtml: O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.

paragraphs.content: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the LORD endureth for ever. Praise ye the LORD.
paragraphs.contentHtml: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the Lord endureth for ever. Praise ye the Lord.
